MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Nunc Pro Tunc On Order Approving Compromise Of Pending Action For A Minor And Establishing Special Needs Trust, Dated March 13, 2018
Off Calendar Jun-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on Petitioner's Notice of Motion for Nunc Pro Tunc on Order Approving Compromise of Pending Action For a Minor and Establishing Special Needs Trust, Dated March 13, 2018.
Dept. 503. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported.

Charles C. Kelly II, Esq. appeared on behalf of Petitioner Megan Cole (Guardian ad Litem for Colton Hillsinger), who was not present.
Jessica Farinas, Esq. of the Urbatsch Law Firm appeared, as representative of the (proposed) Trust.

Based on in the inadvertent omission as presented in counsels' arguments this morning, the Motion for Nunc Pro Tunc on Order Approving Compromise of Pending Action For a Minor and Establishing Special Needs Trust, dated March 13, 2018 is granted.

Order Nunc Pro Tunc Correcting Order Approving Compromise of a Pending Action for a Minor and Establishing a Special Needs Trust, dated March 13, 2018 was submitted and signed by the Court. (See order filed this date for full details.)

Matter is CONTINUED to August 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the establishment of the Colton James Hillsinger Special Needs Trust.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action a Minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Charles C. Kelly, Esq. appeared with petitioner Megan Cole, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for Colton Hillsinger, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Ms. Cole was placed under oath and testified.
Jessica Farinas, Esq. of the Urbatsch Law Firm appeared via telephone, as representative of the (proposed) Trust.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $250,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $57,801.64.
Medical Bills/Liens - $80,877.46.
Costs - $18,793.43.

The net balance of $92,527.47 shall be deposited into the Colton James Hillsinger Special Needs Trust as set forth in Attacment 7c(2)(c) to the Order Approving the Compromise.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to May 8, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the establishment of the Colton James Hillsinger Special Needs Trust.
